productName: Fugu - T1 - Hash Rosin - Pineapple Express - (DOH) - 1g
description: Top-shelf hybrid hash rosin, made by ice-water washing Pineapple Express into bubble hash, then pressing that hash into pure, terpene-drenched oil — two crafts in one jar. Smooth, potent, and terp-heavy — with notes of pineapple, tropical, and citrus, leading into a versatile, anytime balance.
